无量仙翁到底是不是南极仙翁？
封神的局，圣人的意。
一批又一批的穿越者，终究只是为了选出真正的天命之人。
三霄战孔宣，诛仙碰五色。
是兽皇神逆强，还是魔祖罗睺更胜一筹。
当齐天大圣与无天佛祖站在一起，三界六道还有谁能够与之匹敌。
若帝俊还在，圣人之下第一人是否还是孔宣。
在岁月长河的尽头，会不会有一位擎天大汉手握神斧镇守时空。
.........
那天，猴子打碎天庭秩序，开启黑暗神话时代。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o302890aeae0a1ba743e0bc187adfc4cb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鱼缸里的鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7471395961646894105","book_name":"我，杨戬，多娶几个道侣怎么了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471396072032567833","read_count":"16727","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1560359"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"770","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,洪荒","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/82742e3885d9015ca6ab4a9c9c843e7f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470844&x-signature=am81zYdOQT8OZaP4iTEA4GCf5P8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3250593513605773","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"25"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324012724CCD7B817C8421A1ED08F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9103,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21993,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7824},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment
